title: Research Archive
description: Complete pipeline archive for temporal revisitation. Contains all step outputs and metadata for a single run.

pipeline_version.description: Version of the pipeline that produced this archive.

hypotheses.description: Hypothesis results keyed by item ID (Step 2 output).

search_plans.description: Search plans keyed by item ID (Step 3 output).

search_results.description: Search results keyed by item ID (Step 4 output).

scorecards.description: Source scorecards keyed by item ID (Step 5 output).

synthesis.description: Synthesis/assessment/gaps keyed by item ID (Steps 6-8 output).

self_audit.description: Self-audit results keyed by item ID (Step 9 output).

reports.description: Final reports keyed by item ID (Step 10 output).
